Appearances (by Zoom):
Kevin McInerney, Esq. 775-849-3811 for Plaintiff.
Kathryn Mantoan, Esq. 415-773-5887 of Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP for Defendant.
Court reporter: Jenny Craig, CSR#11094, 714-299-0518, stenogal1@gmail.com

RULING - A R G U E D. Mr. McInerney argues several issues. Ms. Mantoan responds. the Court suggests parties to work things out. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANNA HERNANDEZ, LEBRADO MADRAZO's Motion To Compel Discovery.

Plaintiffs' motion to compel discovery is denied for the reasons articulated in the judge pro tem's report and recommendation, which is adopted. (as fully reported in the court reporter's notes/transcript)

Order is signed.
